export declare const DOCUMENT_TYPES: readonly ["MANUAL", "PROCEDURE", "WORK_INSTRUCTION", "RECORD_FORM_INDEX", "COMPANY_FILE", "EXTERNAL_FILE", "AUDIT_REPORT"];
export type DocumentType = (typeof DOCUMENT_TYPES)[number];
export declare const SOURCE_FOLDERS: readonly ["01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06"];
export type SourceFolder = (typeof SOURCE_FOLDERS)[number];
export declare const DOCUMENT_CONTROL_STATUSES: readonly ["draft", "pending_review", "pending", "approved", "effective", "under_review", "archived", "obsolete", "rejected", "inactive"];
export declare const CANONICAL_DOCUMENT_STATUS: {
    readonly DRAFT: "draft";
    readonly PENDING: "pending";
    readonly REJECTED: "rejected";
    readonly EFFECTIVE: "effective";
    readonly ARCHIVED: "archived";
    readonly OBSOLETE: "obsolete";
};
export type CanonicalDocumentStatus = typeof CANONICAL_DOCUMENT_STATUS[keyof typeof CANONICAL_DOCUMENT_STATUS];
export declare const EFFECTIVE_COMPAT_STATUSES: readonly ["effective", "approved"];
export declare function isEffectiveCompatible(status: string | null | undefined): boolean;
export declare function toDisplayStatus(status: string | null | undefined): string;
export declare const REFERENCE_TARGET_TYPES: readonly ["document", "unresolved_document", "conflict_document", "record_form_landing", "unresolved_record_form", "conflict_record_form", "record_template", "business_module", "business_object"];
export type ReferenceTargetType = (typeof REFERENCE_TARGET_TYPES)[number];
export declare const NUMBER_RULE_SCOPES: readonly ["document", "record_template"];
export type NumberRuleScope = typeof NUMBER_RULE_SCOPES[number];
export declare const DEFAULT_DOCUMENT_NUMBER_RULE: {
    readonly format: "{level}-{departmentCode}-{categoryCode}-{sequence}";
    readonly sequencePadding: 3;
    readonly separator: "-";
};
export declare const LANDING_STRATEGIES: readonly ["business_module", "dynamic_form", "partial", "unimplemented", "not_suitable"];
export declare const LANDING_STATUSES: readonly ["business_module", "dynamic_form", "partial", "unimplemented", "not_suitable", "conflict"];
export declare const LANDING_CONFIRMATION_STATUSES: readonly ["unconfirmed", "suggested", "confirmed", "rejected"];
export declare const FIELD_COVERAGE_STATUSES: readonly ["unknown", "covered", "partial", "missing", "not_required"];
export type LandingStrategy = typeof LANDING_STRATEGIES[number];
export type LandingStatus = typeof LANDING_STATUSES[number];
export type LandingConfirmationStatus = typeof LANDING_CONFIRMATION_STATUSES[number];
export type FieldCoverageStatus = typeof FIELD_COVERAGE_STATUSES[number];
export declare const DOCUMENT_RELATION_TYPES: readonly ["IMPLEMENTS", "REQUIRES_RECORD", "EVIDENCE_FOR", "BASED_ON", "REPLACES", "RELATED_TO", "CONTROLLED_BY"];
export type DocumentRelationType = (typeof DOCUMENT_RELATION_TYPES)[number];
export declare const REQUIRED_METADATA_BY_TYPE: Record<DocumentType, string[]>;
